description_long: This is a futuristic, stylized handgun with a predominantly orange and black color scheme, accented by metallic and neon green elements. The body features angular, industrial lines with visible mechanical components, including a set of four cylindrical green cartridges housed in a metallic frame at the rear. The grip is robust and ergonomically shaped, with a matte black finish and subtle texturing for secure handling. The upper section of the handgun displays various warning symbols, chevron patterns, and technical markings, suggesting a high-tech or sci-fi design. The trigger guard is integrated into the lower frame, and the overall construction appears to be a mix of metal and advanced polymers, giving it a solid, durable appearance.
description: A high-tech, orange and black handgun with neon green cartridges, angular lines, and detailed industrial markings. The grip is ergonomic and the design is futuristic with visible mechanical components.
description_view_0: The handgun is seen from the front, showing the stacked arrangement of the green cartridges and the symmetrical, angular muzzle design.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the orange and black body, visible technical markings, and the four green cartridges in their metallic housing.
description_view_2: The rear view focuses on the back of the cartridge housing and the compact, squared-off end of the handgun.
description_view_3: The right side view displays the grip's ergonomic contour, the orange lower frame, and the chevron patterns along the slide.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is robust and angular, with a matte black finish and subtle ergonomic contouring for comfortable handling. It features a slightly flared base for improved stability and appears to have a lightly textured surface for enhanced grip. The design is minimalistic, with no visible logos or embellishments, focusing on functionality and secure handling.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is integrated into the lower frame, moderately thick, and has a squared-off profile with a slight undercut for finger placement. It lacks additional texturing or reinforcement but is visually sturdy and functional, blending seamlessly with the overall industrial design.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and squared, integrated into the upper frame with no visible threading or porting. It has a matte black finish and is partially enclosed by the orange slide, with no external compensators or suppressor threads. The muzzle is flat and angular, matching the overall futuristic aesthetic.
attribute_slide_markings: The slide features several technical markings, including white chevron patterns, warning triangles, and the text 'SpectraJuz v 242' in orange and gray. These markings are located along the sides and top of the slide, rendered in a clean, modern font and style, contributing to the high-tech appearance.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and slightly flared, with a beveled edge for easier insertion and removal. It is finished in matte black, matching the grip, and does not display any logos, finger rests, or additional texturing, maintaining a streamlined and functional look.
